Bash(cd "D:/Code Space/myworldwarbot" && timeout 5 python -c "
from data_loader import load_countries, load_events
from world import World
import main as sim

countries = load_countries\(\)
events = load_events\(\)
world = World\(stability=1.0, risk=0.15, countries=countries\)

for _ in range\(3\):
    world.current_day += 1
    sim.simulate_day\(world, events\)

state = sim.get_world_state\(world\)
print\(f'Day {state[\\"day\\"]} | Countries: {state[\\"total_countries\\"]} | Conflicts: {len\(state[\\"conflicts\\"]\)} | Alliances: {len\(state[\\"alliances\\"]\)}'\)
print\(f'Top power: {state[\\"top5\\"][0][\\"name\\"]} \({state[\\"top5\\"][0][\\"military\\"]:,} troops\)'\)
" 2>&1)
